code:
import io
import string

let s_opt = io.read_line()
let n_opt = io.read_line()

let s = match s_opt
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  ""
end

let n_str = match n_opt
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  "0"
end

let n = match string.parse_int(n_str)
when Some(v)
  v
when None
  0
end

mut result = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  result = "#{result}#{s}"
  i = i + 1
end

println(result)
